title: stachys uniflora
intro: Stachys uniflora, also known as the Narrow-leaved Hedge Woundwort, is a perennial plant species in the mint family native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stachys uniflora include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies for its wound-healing and antiseptic properties.
